info.title: Workfront Planning API V2
info.description: This is Workfront Planning Service API documentation. Workfront Planning Service is responsible for creating and managing new workspace, field, record, record type objects across the Workfront application and Adobe DX infrastructure.

tags.name: Workspaces
tags.description: Workspace management. Limits: max 100,000 workspaces per tenant; max 256 characters for workspace name.

tags.name: Record Types
tags.description: Record type management. Limits: max 100 record types per workspace; max 255 characters for display name.

tags.name: Records
tags.description: Record management. Limits: max 25,000 records per record type; max 100 records per bulk operation; max 500 connections per reference field; max 10 connections per hierarchy field.

tags.name: Fields
tags.description: Field management. Per-record-type quotas: max 500 fields total; max 20 PARAGRAPH (long-text) fields; max 20 FORMULA fields; max 30 REFERENCE fields. Field display names must be unique within a record type and capped at 256 characters. Formula expressions: max 50,000 characters; lookup depth: max 5.

tags.name: Views
tags.description: View management. Limits: max 100 personal views per record type; max 255 characters for view name.

tags.name: Permissions
tags.description: Resource permissions, member management, and access requests.

tags.name: Limits and Quotas
tags.description:
Public API V2 limits and quotas:

- Workspaces per tenant: 100,000
- Record types per workspace: 100
- Records per record type: 25,000
- Records per bulk request: 100
- Fields per record type: 500
- PARAGRAPH (long-text) fields per record type: 20
- FORMULA fields per record type: 20
- REFERENCE fields per record type: 30
- Connections per reference field: 500
- Connections per hierarchy field: 10
- Personal views per record type: 100
- Lookup depth: 5
- Hierarchy depth: 4
- Hierarchy count per workspace: 5
- Formula expression length: 50,000 characters
- Display name length: 256 characters

Exceeding any of these limits returns an HTTP 403 with a specific `errorCode` (e.g. `RECORD_TYPE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED`, `FIELD_LIMIT_EXCEEDED`, `VIEW_LIMIT_EXCEEDED`).

get.description: Retrieve a workspace by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the workspace to be retrieved

put.description: Update an existing workspace using PUT (full replacement). All fields not provided in the request will be set to null.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the workspace to be updated

delete.description: Delete a workspace by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the workspace to be deleted

patch.description: Partially update a workspace using PATCH (merge-patch semantics). Only provided fields will be updated; omitted fields remain unchanged.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the workspace to be patched

get.description: Retrieve a view by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the view to be retrieved

put.description: Update an existing view using PUT (full replacement). All fields not provided in the request will be set to null.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the view to be updated

delete.description: Delete a view by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the view to be deleted

patch.description: Partially update a view using PATCH (merge-patch semantics). Only provided fields will be updated; omitted fields remain unchanged.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the view to be patched

get.description: Retrieve a record by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the record to be retrieved

put.description: Update an existing record using PUT (full replacement). All fields not provided in the request will be set to null.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the record to be updated

delete.description: Delete a record by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the record to be deleted

patch.description: Partially update an existing record using PATCH (merge-patch semantics). Only provided fields will be updated; omitted fields remain unchanged. Setting a field value to JSON null (e.g. {"data":{"F123":null}}) explicitly clears that field; omitting the key leaves the field untouched. For list-type fields (connections, multi-select), you can use operational updates: [{"op": "add", "value": [...]}, {"op": "remove", "value": [...]}].

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the record to be patched

put.description: Update multiple records using PUT semantics (full replacement). All fields not provided will be set to null. Each record must include an id. Limited to 100 records per request.

parameters.name: recordTypeId
parameters.description: ID of the record type

parameters.name: aliased
parameters.description: Flag to include alias support in response (field keys will be aliases instead of IDs)

schema.description: List of records to update. Each must include an id (max 100).

207.description: Mixed results — some items succeeded, some failed

post.description: Create multiple records in a record type in a single request. Limited to 100 records per request.

parameters.name: recordTypeId
parameters.description: ID of the record type

parameters.name: aliased
parameters.description: Flag to include alias support in response (field keys will be aliases instead of IDs)

207.description: Mixed results — some items succeeded, some failed

delete.description: Delete multiple records by their IDs in a single request. Limited to 100 records per request.

parameters.name: recordTypeId
parameters.description: ID of the record type

207.description: Mixed results — some items succeeded, some failed

patch.description: Partially update multiple records using PATCH semantics (merge-patch). Only provided fields are updated; omitted fields remain unchanged. Each record must include an id. Limited to 100 records per request.

parameters.name: recordTypeId
parameters.description: ID of the record type

parameters.name: aliased
parameters.description: Flag to include alias support in response (field keys will be aliases instead of IDs)

schema.description: List of partial record updates. Each must include an id (max 100).

207.description: Mixed results — some items succeeded, some failed

parameters.name: workspaceId
parameters.description: ID of the workspace

parameters.name: sectionIndex
parameters.description: Zero-based index of the section to add the record type to. Defaults to 0 (first section).

post.description: Remove a dynamic (global) record type usage from a workspace. The underlying global record type and its data are preserved; only the workspace association is removed.

parameters.name: recordTypeId
parameters.description: ID of the record type to detach

get.description: Retrieve a page-based paginated list of records for a specific record type. Uses standard page/size query parameters (default page=0, size=20, sorted by createdAt).

parameters.name: recordTypeId
parameters.description: ID of the record type

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Zero-based page index (0..N)

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

post.description: Create a new record in a record type. Subject to limits: max 25,000 records per record type.

parameters.name: recordTypeId
parameters.description: ID of the record type

get.description: Search records using query parameters. Accepts a JSON filter string using the composite filter pattern, field projection, and alias-based field access. Returns page-based paginated records along with group information.

parameters.name: recordTypeId
parameters.description: ID of the record type

parameters.name: recordTypeAlias
parameters.description: Alias of the record type

parameters.name: aliased
parameters.description: Flag to include alias support in response (field keys will be aliases instead of IDs)

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: JSON filter using the composite filter pattern. Example: {"operator":"AND","conditions":[{"fieldId":"status","condition":"IS","value":"Active"}]}

parameters.name: groupingFieldIds
parameters.description: List of field IDs to group results by

parameters.name: scopeWorkspaceIds
parameters.description: List of workspace IDs to scope the search to (for global record types)

parameters.name: globalRecordTypeWorkspaceFieldId
parameters.description: ID of the global record type workspace field (for global record types)

parameters.name: fieldIds
parameters.description: List of field IDs to include in the record's data

parameters.name: fieldAliases
parameters.description: List of field aliases to include in the record's data

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Zero-based page index (0..N)

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

post.description: Search records using the composite filter pattern with strongly-typed conditions. Supports recursive AND/OR filter nesting, sorting, grouping, field projection, and alias-based field access. Returns page-based paginated records along with group information.

parameters.name: recordTypeId
parameters.description: ID of the record type

parameters.name: aliased
parameters.description: Flag to include alias support in response (field keys will be aliases instead of IDs)

parameters.name: fieldIds
parameters.description: List of field IDs to include in the record's data

parameters.name: fieldAliases
parameters.description: List of field aliases to include in the record's data

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Zero-based page index (0..N)

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

post.description: Reorder one or more records within a record type by specifying where to place them. Provide exactly one of putAfterRecordId (place after) or putBeforeRecordId (place before). Maximum 100 records per request. Requires EDIT permission on the record type. Move is all-or-nothing: on failure, no records are reordered.

parameters.name: recordTypeId
parameters.description: ID of the record type

207.description: Move failed — all records remain in original positions

404.description: Record Type or anchor record not found

get.summary: List pending access requests for a resource

RecordTypeSectionDto.description: Section for organizing and grouping record types within a workspace. Sections are ordered by their position in the array.

displayName.description: Display name of the record type section

recordTypeIds.description: List of record type IDs included in this section

UserReferenceDto.description: Reference to a user with identifier and display name

WorkspaceBaseDto.description: Base class for Workspace DTOs containing common workspace properties

createdAt.description: Date/time when this entity was created

updatedBy.description: User who last updated this entity

updatedAt.description: Date/time when this entity was last updated

alias.description: Unique alias identifier for the workspace

name.description: Display name of the workspace. Maximum 256 characters; cannot be blank.

description.description: Description of the workspace purpose and content. Maximum 1024 characters.
description.example: Workspace for managing marketing campaigns and assets

ownerId.description: User ID of the workspace owner

recordTypeSections.description: List of record type sections for organizing record types

V2FieldError.description: Field-level error detail used in validation errors and per-item batch failures.

field.description: Name of the field or path that caused the error.

message.description: Human-readable explanation of the error for this field.
message.example: Workspace name can not be blank

code.description: Machine-readable code identifying the validation rule that failed.

V2ProblemDetail.description: RFC 7807 Problem Details error response for V2 endpoints.

title.description: Short, human-readable summary of the error type. Same for all occurrences of the same error.

status.description: HTTP status code of the response.

detail.description: Human-readable, resource-specific explanation of this error occurrence. Always English.
detail.example: Record type with ID 'Rt69b14f7e' was not found.

messageArguments.description: Named parameters used to compose the detail message. Values are always strings.

requestId.description: Request correlation ID for tracing and support.

errors.description: Field-level or per-item error details. Present for validation, business-rule, or batch failures.

DynamicFieldMetadataDto.description: Dynamic field metadata for global/dynamic record types

scopeWorkspaceId.description: Workspace ID this view is scoped to

dynamicFieldIds.description: Field IDs that are workspace-specific (dynamic) in this view

fieldId.description: ID or alias of the field to group by

direction.description: Sort direction for the grouped values (asc or desc). Defaults to asc if omitted.

fieldId.description: ID or alias of the field to sort by

direction.description: Sort direction (asc or desc). Defaults to asc if omitted.

ViewDto.description: View data containing all view properties

createdAt.description: Date/time when this entity was created

updatedBy.description: User who last updated this entity

updatedAt.description: Date/time when this entity was last updated

name.description: Name of the view. Maximum 255 characters; cannot be blank. Each record type allows up to 100 personal views.

type.description: Type of the view (TABLE, TIMELINE, CALENDAR, LIST, GALLERY)

recordTypeId.description: ID of the record type this view belongs to

filter.description: Filter conditions applied to records in this view

grouping.description: Grouping configuration for records in this view

sorting.description: Sorting configuration for records in this view

metadata.description: View-specific metadata (column widths, date fields, etc.)

isHidden.description: Whether this view is hidden from the view list

isPublicShared.description: Whether this view is publicly shared via a link

isRestricted.description: Whether this view is restricted (limited access for global/dynamic record types)

ViewMetadataDto.description: View metadata containing view-type specific configuration

type.description: Type of the view metadata (should match view type)

showThumbnail.description: Whether to show thumbnail images in the view

showRecordColoring.description: Whether to show record coloring in the view

columnMetadata.description: Column metadata for table views (visibility and width)

newColumnMetadata.description: New column metadata for table views (visible fields only)

rowOrder.description: Custom row order for table views (deprecated)

startDateKey.description: Field ID of the start date field (required for timeline and calendar views)

endDateKey.description: Field ID of the end date field (for timeline and calendar views)

timelineScale.description: Timeline scale type for timeline views

cardFieldIds.description: Field IDs to display on timeline bars or calendar cards

rowHeight.description: Row height setting for table and calendar views

truncateRecordContent.description: Whether to truncate record content in timeline views

dynamicFieldMetadata.description: Dynamic field metadata for global/dynamic record types

FilterCondition.description: Supported filter conditions for record search

fieldId.description: ID or alias of the field to filter on

value.description: Value to compare against. Omit for unary conditions (IS_EMPTY, IS_NOT_EMPTY). Use an array for range conditions (IS_BETWEEN) or multi-value conditions (IS_ANY_OF). For People fields (USER, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_BY, APPROVED_BY), by default plain string values are interpreted as Adobe IMS user IDs when the customer is IMS-migrated; otherwise they are interpreted as Workfront user IDs. To explicitly set the ID type and avoid ambiguity, pass a typed object such as {"id":"63e3b13000078c1795146248182d15dc","idType":"WF"} (use "idType":"IMS" for Adobe IMS IDs).

matchExternalId.description: When true, values for REFERENCE fields are treated as external connection IDs and resolved to internal record IDs before the search executes. Only valid for external REFERENCE fields (isExternal=true).

FilterConditionDto.description: A leaf filter condition applied to a single field

conditions.description: List of filter nodes: leaf conditions or nested groups

FilterGroupDto.description: A group of filter conditions combined with a logical operator (AND/OR). Supports recursive nesting for complex filter logic.

FilterNodeDto.description: A node in the filter tree: either a leaf condition or a nested group

FilterOperator.description: Logical operator for combining filter conditions

CoverImageDto.description: Cover image information for a record

position.description: Vertical position of the cover image

RecordBaseDto.description: Partial record data to update. Only provided fields will be updated.

createdAt.description: Date/time when this entity was created

updatedBy.description: User who last updated this entity

updatedAt.description: Date/time when this entity was last updated

recordTypeId.description: ID of the record type this record belongs to

data.description: Field data for the record as key-value pairs where keys are field IDs

thumbnailUrl.description: URL of the record thumbnail image

coverImage.description: Cover image information for the record

RecordDto.description: Complete record data including all record properties

createdAt.description: Date/time when this entity was created

updatedBy.description: User who last updated this entity

recordTypeId.description: ID of the record type this record belongs to

data.description: Field data for the record as key-value pairs where keys are field IDs

thumbnailUrl.description: URL of the record thumbnail image

coverImage.description: Cover image information for the record

recordTypeAlias.description: Alias of the record type (only populated when aliased=true)

RecordBulkItemErrorDto.description: Per-item error detail in a bulk record operation response.

message.description: Human-readable explanation of this specific item failure.
message.example: Record with ID 'Rc123' was not found.

details.description: Optional structured context for this item failure.

RecordBulkRequestErrorDto.description: Request-level error affecting multiple items in a bulk operation.

message.description: Human-readable description of the request-level error.
message.example: Bulk operation limit of 100 items per request exceeded; 58 items were skipped

affectedIds.description: IDs of the items affected by this request-level error.

RecordBulkResponseDto.description: Response envelope for V2 bulk record operations.

requestId.description: Request correlation ID for tracing and support.

results.description: Per-item results in the same order as the input.

RecordBulkResultItemDtoObject.description: Result for one input item in a bulk record operation.

requestIndex.description: Zero-based index of the input item.

id.description: Record ID for this item when available.

error.description: Error payload. Present only when status is error.

record.description: Record payload. Present on successful create, update, and patch items.

AuthzSubjectDtoV2.description: Authorization subject reference (user, group, team, etc.)

RecordTypeDto.description: Complete record type data including linkability settings and external options

updatedBy.description: User who last updated this entity

alias.description: Unique alias identifier for the record type

displayName.description: Display name of the record type. Maximum 255 characters; cannot be blank.

description.description: Description of the record type purpose. Maximum 1024 characters.

primaryFieldId.description: ID of the primary field for this record type

icon.description: Icon identifier for the record type

color.description: Color theme for the record type

isExternal.description: Indicates if this is an external record type

sourceRecordTypeId.description: ID of an existing global record type to attach to the workspace (used only on create). When provided, the record type is not created but attached as a dynamic usage.

externalOptions.description: External options for external record types

linkableWithAllWorkspaces.description: Indicates if this record type can be linked with all workspaces

RecordTypeExternalOptionsDto.description: External options for external record types

fields.description: Field mappings between external and internal fields

UpdateMembersRequestDto.description: Bulk grant, update, and revoke operations for resource members

grant.description: Members to grant new access to

update.description: Members whose existing role should be changed

revoke.description: Members to revoke all access from

inheritViewOnly.description: Set inheritance for a record-type (true=inherited, false=view-only). Only valid for record-types.

wildcard.description: Set wildcard access mode for a record. Only valid for records.

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for fetching the next page. Absent when there are no more pages.

hasMore.description: Whether more items exist beyond this page

content.description: List of workspaces in the current page

cursor.description: Cursor metadata for fetching subsequent pages

content.description: List of record types in the current page

cursor.description: Cursor metadata for fetching subsequent pages

CellValueDto.description: A snapshot of a field value at a point in time

value.description: The stored value of the field at the time of the change

fieldSnapshot.description: Snapshot of the field metadata at the time of the change

content.description: List of history entries in the current page

cursor.description: Cursor metadata for fetching subsequent pages

FieldSnapshotDto.description: Snapshot of field metadata captured at the time of the change

hasError.description: Whether the field has a configuration error

options.description: Options for single-select or multi-select fields

HistoryEntryDto.description: A single record field change event

id.description: Unique identifier of this history entry

recordId.description: ID of the record this change belongs to

createdBy.description: ID of the user who made the change

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the change occurred

fieldId.description: ID of the field that changed

content.description: List of views in the current page

cursor.description: Cursor metadata for fetching subsequent pages

content.description: List of fields in the current page

cursor.description: Cursor metadata for fetching subsequent pages

PermissionDto.description: Current user's effective permissions on a resource

canView.description: Whether the user can view this resource

canEdit.description: Whether the user can edit this resource

canDelete.description: Whether the user can delete this resource

canAdd.description: Whether the user can add items to this resource

AccessRequestDto.description: A pending access request for a resource

id.description: Unique identifier of the access request

RequesterDto.description: The user who submitted an access request

MemberPermissionDto.description: A subject (user, group, team, role, or company) with a role on a resource

avatarUrl.description: Avatar URL of the subject, if available

role.description: Role of the subject on this resource

InheritanceDto.description: Workspace-member inheritance setting for a record type

inherited.description: When true, workspace members inherit their workspace-level access on this record type. When false, workspace members are restricted to view-only.

BulkDeleteRequestDto.description: List of record IDs to delete

ids.description: List of record IDs to delete (max 100)

DeleteAccessRequestsDto.description: Request body for dismissing access requests

requestIds.description: IDs of access requests to dismiss
